title: Are you a certified STAY or just vibing?
description: This quiz separates the casual listeneres from the lyric-analyzing, survival-show-watching, inside-joke-kowing STAYs

questions.question: Which Stray Kids song features the iconic 'Stray Kids, woo!'?

What member is known for his powerful aegyo resistance?
Which song includes the lyric: 'I'm not sorry, I'm dirty'?
